references.text: Shuying, J & H Ohba. 2001. Itea. Flora of China 8: 423-428.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 24 January 2026

species.citation: Wall. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 2 (1824) 419 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219. = Itea luzonensis Elmer , LPB 2 (1908) 528; Type: Elmer 7484, Luzon: Tayabas, Lucban, Mt. Banahao, 2400ft, May-1906.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, China, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam. CEBU, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Bataan, Benguet, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon (photos), Davao de Oro (photos), Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS.
species.notes: Widespread throughout the Philippines. Medium elevation forests. 0-1350m.

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 2 (1908) 528 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 220; Type: Elmer 7566, Luzon: Tayabas, Lucban, May-1906.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LEYTE, LUZON: Laguna, Quezon.
